text: Being here, I feel a heightened sense of curiosity and intellectual stimulation. The modern design and the focus on "R + D"—research and development—remind me that I am among people who value inquiry and new ideas. There is a sense of anticipation, as if knowledge is ready to be discovered just around the corner. I feel both a bit like an outsider, observing the scene from the glass-walled corridor, and yet drawn in by the promise of innovative thought. I’m quietly eager to engage and learn more.
